title: Thai-Style Prawn Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy Thai-inspired stir fry made with succulent prawns, charred vegetables, and a hint of comfort.

ingredients.name: charred vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as bell peppers, carrots, and onions

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the charred vegetables and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until tender.
Add the prawns and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until pink and cooked through.
Add the pad thai sauce, fish sauce, brown sugar, and chili flakes (if using). Stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
Garnish with chopped cilantro or scallions (if desired).
Leftovers can be refrigerated for up to 3 days and reheated as needed.
